  "findings": [
    "No electrical service disconnect installed within sight of the condenser/heat pump unit."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a code-compliant, weatherproof electrical disconnect switch within sight of and readily accessible from the outdoor unit before final inspection."
  ],
  "rationale": "Both the International Mechanical Code (IMC), International Residential Code (IRC M1401), and the National Electrical Code (NEC 440.14) strictly require an electrical disconnect switch to be located within sight of and readily accessible from the air-conditioning or refrigerating equipment. The absence of this disconnect is a major safety hazard for servicing technicians and a critical code violation.",
  "references": [
    "IMC Section 307 / Chapter 11",
    "IRC M1401",
    "NEC 440.14",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manual"
  ]
}
